summary: Excellent mix that finally lets the guitars shine through a typically keyboard‑heavy show, making this the go‑to recording of the night.
review: Reviewers rave about the balance of this release – the keyboards sit back enough to hear Jerry’s guitar work clearly, something other sources of the same concert fail to deliver. While no specific musical moments are called out, the comment that “the show would be wasted if it weren’t for this recording” suggests the performance itself is solid and worth hearing when presented with a clean mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Single five‑star review focuses on superior audio balance; no negative comments, but limited data prevents high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix is notably clearer than other versions – guitars are audible and not buried under keyboards, indicating a well‑balanced master with minimal muddiness.
